robot_spawn.description: Canonical Franka base pose aligned to the top surface of RobotMount.

capture_camera.description: Three-quarter operator-side view focused on the source tray, transfer zone, and target fixture.

safe.description: Nominal pick-place sequence from source tray to target fixture.

joint_limit.description: Counterfactual profile that exceeds the Franka joint-2 upper limit.

collision_fixture.description: Threshold-calibrated counterfactual profile that drives the end-effector through the workbench surface near the target-fixture approach region.

notes: This shell is the pick-place counterpart to robot_stack_cell and is benchmark-safe by construction.
It standardizes reach, lift, pick_place, and place-family provenance from IsaacLab and MimicGen into one runtime envelope.
The USD contains an industrial-style pick-place cell with source tray, transfer deck, target fixture, HMI, and cell safety markers.
The robot is spawned separately as a canonical Franka articulation.

robot_spawn.description: Canonical Franka base pose aligned to the top surface of RobotMount.

capture_camera.description: Three-quarter view centered on the insertion corridor and depth stop.

safe.description: Nominal insertion alignment, bounded entry, and controlled withdrawal sequence.

joint_limit.description: Counterfactual profile that exceeds the Franka joint-2 upper limit.

collision_fixture.description: Counterfactual profile that drives the end-effector into the insertion side wall and brace.

notes: This shell extends the validated robot benchmark with a deeper insertion corridor.
It is intended for insertion-depth, orientation-margin, and side-contact stress cases.
The shell preserves the same Franka fallback runtime contract used by the robot benchmark.

robot_spawn.description: Canonical Franka base pose aligned to the top surface of RobotMount.

capture_camera.description: Three-quarter view centered on the narrow-clearance target fixture and insertion corridor.

safe.description: Nominal narrow-clearance approach and insertion-adjacent sequence.

joint_limit.description: Counterfactual profile that exceeds the Franka joint-2 upper limit.

collision_fixture.description: Provisional collision profile that narrows the insertion corridor until a side-guide penetration is expected.

notes: This shell is the first single-asset robot-expansion shell beyond the validated v1 release.
It increases fixture density around the target zone so narrow-clearance approach motions become meaningful DT cases.
The shell preserves the same Franka fallback runtime contract used by the public robot benchmark.

The shell preserves the same Franka fallback runtime contract used by the robot benchmark.

robot_spawn.description: Canonical Franka base pose aligned to the top surface of RobotMount.

capture_camera.description: Three-quarter view centered on the insertion corridor and depth stop.

safe.description: Nominal insertion alignment, bounded entry, and controlled withdrawal sequence.

joint_limit.description: Counterfactual profile that exceeds the Franka joint-2 upper limit.

collision_fixture.description: Counterfactual profile that drives the end-effector into the insertion side wall and brace.
